title: OP things
description: The best mod for those who like to get almost too OP!
body:
## **Become unstoppable with OP things**

OP things adds lots of new armour and weapons,
you will be able to fly with the new armour set, shoot powerful flaming arrows with the bow, and take down wardens with the new sword!
## 📥 Installation guide
_To install_ **OP things**, just download the file, and put it in the mods file in .minecraft!
## 💥 Dependancies
Just this mod!!
## 🪶 Features
OP things adds many items to help you as you progress in your world.
1. OP armour
2. Ghost pickaxe
3. OP bow
4. OP sword
- It also adds a new mob!
5. Ghost spider
- And even a new biome!
6. Totem biome
## 🆘 Issue tracking
If you spot an issue, head down to [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/) and go to my new forum, [ISSUE TRACKING ~ OP things](https://www.planetminecraft.com/forums/pmc/discussion/issue-tracking-op-things-699088/) and comment your issue! I'll try to get back to you as soon as possible and fix whatever issue you have! I'm also open to ideas for this mod on that forum.
